construction_strategy: 1. Create a 2D sketch for the sweep path using the vertical leg, horizontal leg, and R50 fillet. 2. Create a 2D sketch for the circular profile (D8) on a plane normal to the path start/end. 3. Perform a Sweep operation using the circular profile along the path.

features.name: Sweep Path
features.profile: L-shaped path consisting of a vertical line, a 90-degree arc, and a horizontal line

placement.reference: Normal to end of sweep path

features.description: Solid rod created by sweeping the 8mm circular profile along the defined path
features.name: Solid Bent Rod

overall_shape: An L-shaped solid cylindrical rod with a 90-degree radiused bend.
title: BENT ROUND TUBE - SWEEP FEATURE

uncertainties.description: It is unclear if the leg lengths (250 and 230) are overall dimensions including the bend or lengths of the straight segments only. Standard practice usually implies overall tangent-to-end or intersection-to-end.
Specified as 'SOLID ROD FOR 3D PRINTING', but specific material type is not defined.

views.description: Side profile view showing the L-shaped bent tube with centerline and cross-section profile
